title: FolioMorph
description: PERN-stack app that converts uploaded PDFs into interactive flipbooks with JWT authentication and Zod validation.

title: Spill the Beans
description: Pure front-end static online Kaffee Markt built using React.js and Tailwind CSS with AOS animation effects.

title: Medium Blog API
description: Backend API for a blogging platform supporting CRUD operations with JWT-based authentication and input validation.
